section_name: Reciprocal driver license agreements with provinces of Canada
text: The commissioner may execute a reciprocal compact or agreement not inconsistent with the provisions of this chapter with the motor vehicle administrator or other authorized official of any province of Canada to effectuate the purposes set forth in subdivision (b) of article one of § 516 (Driver license compact) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 20. Suspension & Revocation
##### § 516-A — Reciprocal driver license agreements with provinces of Canada

The commissioner may execute a reciprocal compact or agreement not inconsistent with the provisions of this chapter with the motor vehicle administrator or other authorized official of any province of Canada to effectuate the purposes set forth in subdivision (b) of article one of § 516 (Driver license compact) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The commissioner may execute a reciprocal compact or agreement not inconsistent with the provisions of this chapter with the motor vehicle administrator or other authorized official of any province of Canada to effectuate the purposes set forth in subdivision (b) of article one of § 516 (Driver license compact) .
